notes: This release includes: (1) Command namespace migration - Claude Code uses subdirectory (.claude/commands/polygon/), Cursor uses filename prefix (.cursor/commands/polygon-*); (2) Bug fix for incorrect task directory paths in agent docs - these files will be updated via normal template sync
